◎简　　介  

　　In the middle of the outback, a stolen 4WD collides with a transport truck. Two local kids in the car are badly hurt. Someone should have called for help, but they didn’t. They didn’t because they work for an international research project no-one talks about and their cargo is a prohibited substance.The accident would have remained a mystery were it not for Ned (Dan Spielman) ...
